releaseIntent._instructions: Human approver: edit freely. action: auto (release on deploy) | hold (do not release yet) | manual (a human runs the release). Structured fields execute; anything else goes in notes (an agent will structure it on the PR for your review). Blank fields = default auto-release on deploy. prerequisites: [{"flagKey": "flag-xyz", "variation": "on"}]. notBefore: YYYY-MM-DD. reference: ticket/doc URL.
